decisions.rationale: Hard bail-out prevents React reconciling innerHTML subtree during hover state changes
setState mid-drag triggers re-render that resets browser selection anchor
UX rule: suppress hover jitter during drag; complementary to memoization
Previous containment guard too conservative; Phase 21 can re-add exclusions
